Project Blackpink
Project Blackpink

Built for how
talent decisions
actually happen.

An internal talent management and succession planning system, designed for DSTA HR Talent Managers and Leadership to make better, faster, more confident decisions.

About the project

Who it's
for.

Talent Managers
Primary users. Manage plans, assign roles, capture feedback
CE / DCEs
Review and guide succession decisions in meetings
PC Heads
Visibility into pipeline health and talent readiness

Goal: support effective talent development, succession planning, leadership pipeline management, and exposure activities management, all in one integrated system.

The transformation

Today vs
Tomorrow.

Fragmented documents and spreadsheets
→
One unified, live system
Inconsistent, manual record-keeping
→
Consistent, disciplined talent management
Reactive, scrambling when requests come in
→
Proactive tracking and ready-state planning
Intuition and memory-based decisions
→
System-supported, data-informed decisions
The system

Six modules.
One system.

01
Dashboard
Pipeline alerts, bench strength, upcoming milestones
02
Talent Directory
Full profiles, development plans, notes
03
Talent Programmes
Enrolments and programme progress
04
Exposure Opportunities
Roles, taskforces, AI-matched talent pools
05 — Today's focus
Succession Planning
Live plans, recommended successors, one-click reports
06
Route of Advancement
ROA pacing and development trajectory
Succession Planning

The live
succession plan.

Each plan shows the incumbent and ranked successors across two time horizons: Possible Next Successors (0–4 years) and Possible Future Successors (5–10 years). Plans are organised by Programme Centre, with an "Others" section for MINDEF and non-DSTA roles.

View mode
Browse any plan cleanly. All details visible, nothing editable by accident
Edit mode
Click Edit to unlock: add, remove, reorder. Exit to lock the plan again
Show other plans
Toggle on to see every other succession plan each person already appears in
Click a feature to preview
Click image to expand
×
Succession Planning

The system already
knows who.

Click Add Successor and recommended candidates surface at the top. No hunting through spreadsheets. The logic is systematic and transparent:

0–4 year band
Candidates exactly one appointment level below the incumbent
5–10 year band
Candidates two or three levels below the incumbent
Sort order
Highest LP, then highest SG, then oldest age. The criteria that matter most, applied automatically
Bulk add
Select multiple candidates at once, add them all in one click, then reorder as needed
Succession Planning

Real questions,
fast answers,
built for the live meeting.

"Eh, how about moving this person from this plan to the other? Can I see which plans they're already in?"

— A real question from CE, in a live meeting
Drag & drop
Reorder and reposition successors instantly, live, in the room, with CE watching
"Moved" label
Cards that have been repositioned show a Moved indicator, so nothing changes without anyone noticing
Show other plans
One toggle. See every plan this person is in across all PCs, answered in seconds
Succession Planning

The report that
writes itself.

Before
  • Open Word template manually
  • Look up each successor's full name, DOB, SG, ROA appointment, date of first SG
  • Copy and paste, one field at a time
  • Risk of typos, wrong dates, outdated info
  • Email to PSD hoping it's all correct
Now
  • Click Generate Report
  • Select plans, filter by job grade and appointment
  • Word document generated instantly
  • All data pulled live from SAP. No copy-pasting, no human error
  • Ready-formatted, ready to email to PSD
Succession Planning

A few more
things.

System guardrails
If you add someone who is already an incumbent, or already in the 0–4 year band, the system flags it: informing the decision, not blocking it
Change log
Every addition, removal, and reorder is recorded with a timestamp. A full audit trail for when plans are reviewed months later
Custom job roles
The "Others" section handles MINDEF roles and non-DSTA appointments. Create the role, add an incumbent, plan successors the same way
Navigation

The overview.
